text:
- Routine Supplies (Nonreportable) 
(Rev. 10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21) 

Routine supplies are supplies that are customarily used in small quantities during the 
course of most home care visits. They are usually included in the staff's supplies and not 
designated for a specific patient. These supplies are included in the cost per visit of home 
health care services. Routine supplies would not include those supplies that are 
specifically ordered by
